pr.title: RHOAIENG-60592: Update workbench fails with "Workbench admission webhook error"
pr.body:
When a DSPA CR exists in a namespace but has nil pointer fields
(ObjectStorage, ExternalStorage, or S3CredentialSecret), the controller
crashes with a nil pointer dereference during every Notebook reconcile
and webhook call, causing a crash loop that blocks all workbench updates
in that namespace. This adds nil checks before dereferencing these
pointer fields so the controller returns a clear error instead of
panicking.

Resolves [RHOAIENG-60592](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-60592).
Resolves #744.

Related [RHOAIENG-37059](https://redhat.atlassian.net/browse/RHOAIENG-37059).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Thom Carlin <tcarlin@redhat.com>

<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->

## Summary by CodeRabbit

* **Bug Fixes**
  * Enhanced validation of notebook configuration fields with explicit checks for missing or null values, preventing potential runtime errors and providing clearer error messages when configuration is incomplete.

* **Tests**
  * Added test coverage for validation scenarios with missing or invalid notebook configuration values.

<!-- end of auto-generated comment: release notes by coderabbit.ai -->
